violations.text: The condensate from the ice bin is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The hand wash sink at the bar was observed being used as a dump sink. Hand washing sinks must not be used for a purpose other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The hand wash sink in the ware-washing area was observed in poor repair (not dispensing water). New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took dishwasher out of service and instructed employees to utilize three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
